login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your servers and access your dashboard.

signUp.title: Create your account
signUp.subtitle: Get a free account to add and manage your Minecraft servers.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.subtitle: Confirming your email address — hang on a moment.
verifyEmail.successDescription: Your account is ready. You can now sign in.
verifyEmail.errorDescription: We couldn't verify this email. The link may have expired.

loginForm.successDescription: Your account has been logged in successfully

signUpForm.successDescription: Your account has been created — check your inbox to confirm your email.
signUpForm.terms: By creating an account you agree to our <link>terms of service</link>.

changePassword.hint: Use at least 8 characters. You'll stay signed in on this device.
changePassword.successDescription: Your password has been changed successfully

serverForm.name: Name
serverForm.websiteDescription: Left empty, we infer it from the address

addServer.successDescription: Your server has been added successfully, it will be available in a few minutes
addServer.duplicateDescription: This server is already on Minecraft Stats as <link>{name}</link>.
addServer.errorDescription: An error occurred while adding the server.

editServer.unauthorized: You are not authorized to edit this server
editServer.successDescription: Your server has been edited successfully
editServer.deletedDescription: Your server has been deleted successfully

validation.passwordsDoNotMatch: New password and confirm password do not match
validation.newPasswordSameAsOld: New password cannot be the same as the old password
